Water Slide Rentals in Windsor NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals delivers inflatable water slides to Windsor for summer birthdays, backyard parties, school fun days, and outdoor celebrations. Choose from the Crown Island Combo, Crown Rush 42, and Crown Cascade. Based in Bridgewater — setup and takedown always included. Windsor is the birthplace of hockey and home to the Hants County Exhibition — one of Nova Scotia's oldest agricultural fairs. It's a fast-growing community between HRM and the Annapolis Valley, with strong school, community, and backyard event culture year-round.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Approximately 75 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted — $0.72/km after the first 15 km. Nova Kingdom Rentals serves Windsor and the Annapolis Valley for backyard birthdays, school events, community celebrations, and larger occasions. Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Best For

  • Summer backyard parties
  • School water days
  • Community events
  • Birthday parties
  • Hot weather events

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you deliver water slide rentals to Windsor?
Yes — Nova Kingdom Rentals delivers inflatable water slides to Windsor and surrounding Valley communities. We are based in Bridgewater (approximately 75 km). Travel is quoted at $0.72/km after the first 15 km.
What water slides are available?
Available wet-use inflatables include the Crown Island Combo (splash pool combo, great for younger kids), the Crown Rush 42 (taller slide, better suited to older kids and teens), and the Crown Cascade. We confirm availability and suitability for your event when you request a quote.
What do I need to set up a water slide?
A level, grassy area with no overhead obstructions, access to a standard garden hose and water connection, and a nearby power outlet. We confirm setup requirements with you before booking.
How old do kids need to be to use a water slide?
Age and height suitability depends on the unit. The Crown Island Combo splash pool suits younger children. The Crown Rush 42 is better for older kids and teens. We confirm age and height guidance when you request your rental.
